Name: UMovieSceneFolder
Description: Reprents a folder used for organizing objects in tracks in a movie scene.

Variables.Name: ChildFolders
Variables.Description: The folders contained by this folder.

Variables.Name: ChildMasterTracks
Variables.Description: The master tracks contained by this folder.

Variables.Name: ChildObjectBindingStrings
Variables.Description: The guid strings used to serialize the guids for the object bindings contained by this folder.
